footnotes.text: Asia: the Roman Province of Asia, the western part of what is now know as Asia Minor. The seven spirits: the Holy Spirit, whose seven gifts are diffused among all the churches; or the phrase may refer to the seven angels.
The Alpha and the Omega: the first and last letters of the Greek alphabet. God is the first beginning and the last end.
The image is that of brass glowing in the refiner's furnace.
